name: Proline Kitten Food - Chicken 400g
shortDescription: Fully balanced all-natural kitten food with chicken protein. Carefully formulated by a cat nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all growing kittens.
description: Proline Kitten Food - Chicken , fully balanced all-natural kitten food with chicken protein. Carefully formulated by a cat nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of growing kittens. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein...........................36% Fat ................................20% Crude Ash ................................... 8% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) .............3%  Essential Vitamins & Minerals Minerals: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. Vitamins: A, D, E, C, K, and B-complex (B1, B2, B3 [niacin], B6, B7 [biotin], B9 [folic acid], B12), Choline, Calcium Pantothenate. These nutrients ensure: . Strong bone growth and teeth development . Healthy immune system . Vital organ and nerve function  Feeding Guide For kittens aged 1–12 months: Age Daily Amount 1–3 months 30–50g 4–6 months 50–70g 7–12 months 70–90g Adjust according to your kitten’s size and activity level. Always provide fresh, clean water.  Why Cat Parents Love It: . Specially formulated for tiny teeth and delicate tummies. . Includes taurine for healthy eyes and heart. . Promotes playful energy and a silky-soft coat.
